MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Brendan M. Ford (email: BFord@FordDiulio.com) of the law offices of Ford & Diulio PC (Tel: 714.450.6830) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, MARC R. STIIMPERT (email: marc@lunskilaw.com) of the law offices of LUNSKI & STIMPERT LLP (Tel: 415.426.3586) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides on record as reflected in the notes of the Certified Shorthand Reporter.

DEFENDANT NICO CORPORATION'S Motion To Dismiss Case is taken under submission as of Jan-11-2021 by Judge Schulman.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tyler E. Sanchez, esq. (714-450-6830) of Ford & Diulio PC for Plaintiff.
Marc Stimpert, esq. (415-426-3586) of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs IAN HANNULA, JOSEPH HALLER and NICO CORPORATION's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And Quash Service Of Process is granted. (see word minutes for full details).

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Default Judgment And Award Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants NICO corporation, a California corporation, Ian Matthew Hannula, an individual, and Joseph Philip Haller, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Tyler E. Sanchez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Focus 15, LLC.
Elizabeth Salen and Laurie Salen, Managing Members of Focus 15, LLC, were placed under oath and testified.
Pat Donahue, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendants NICO corporation, a California corporation, Ian Matthew Hannula, an individual, or Joseph Philip Haller, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Promissory Notes was filed on October 31, 2017.
Substitute servive on defendants NICO corporation, a California corporation, Ian Matthew Hannula, an individual, and Joseph Philip Haller, an individual, took place on August 10, 2018, and was effected as to all three defendants on August 20, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 18, 2019.
Defaults as to all three defendants were entered on February 1, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Focus 15, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants NICO corporation, a California corporation, Ian Matthew Hannula, an individual, and Joseph Philip Haller, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $225,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $37,693.15.
Attorney Fees - $46,915.00.
Costs - $4,661.46.
2% Late Fees - $15,633.64.

Total - $329,903.25.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
